title: Haram Yeo’s CV
text:
Supply Chain Management & Data Science Student

ramy00yhr@gmail.com | LinkedIn | 986-497-7453



Supply Chain Management major with a Data Science minor at BYU-Idaho, focused on data-driven decision making, operations optimization, and analytics.


Data Analytics, Supply Chain Optimization, Process Improvement, Business Strategy



Data analytics, supply chain systems, process optimization, machine learning, and operational efficiency




Jan 2024 – Jul 2027
Brigham Young University - Idaho

Bachelor’s in Supply Chain Management
Minor in Data Science
GPA: 4.0 / 4.0
Full Academic Scholarship
President, Supply Chain Management Society (Sep 2025 – Dec 2025)




Programming: Python, ML
Data Tools: Excel, SQL, R, Power BI, Tableau



Oct 2025 – Dec 2025
Operations Consulting Project | Mac Shack, Rexburg, Idaho

Developed a capacity model analyzing 100+ orders
Identified bottlenecks at 10 parties/hour
Recommended adding tables to increase throughput

Jul 2025
Sales Data Analysis Project, Rexburg, Idaho

Queried and analyzed 133,440 sales records
Identified repeat purchase patterns driving 28.27% of transactions
Uncovered inefficiencies in promotion strategy




Oct 2024 – Dec 2024
Manito Scoop | Founder, Seoul, South Korea

Increased packaging productivity by 20% by redesigning workflows from 60 to 72 units/hour
Optimized supply chain by sourcing directly from suppliers, cutting costs by 20%
Launched and managed an online candy store, generating $900 in sales in 10 weeks

Apr 2024 – Jul 2024
Spud Shack (Student-Run Business) | CEO, Rexburg, Idaho

Reduced COGS from 43% to 25% in 4 weeks by adjusting portion sizes and improving menu-cost alignment
Guided innovation KPIs to 100% and achieved 87% prototype customer satisfaction before launch
Achieved 88% overall customer satisfaction within the first 4 weeks
Directed cross-functional teams to launch a student-run food business, generating $5,332 in revenue in 9 weeks

Sep 2022 – Dec 2023
I-Sense PC Cafe | Manager, Seoul, South Korea

Redesigned kitchen workflow layout, reducing average food prep time by 10%
Supervised a 4-person staff, oversaw scheduling and inventory, and maintained 90%+ customer satisfaction
Trained 5+ new employees on operational standards, reducing onboarding time

Jan 2021 – Jul 2022
Republic of Korea Army | Administrative Assistant, HR, Gangwon, South Korea

Led a team of 5 soldiers and supervised inventory of 1,000+ military assets with 100% accountability during audits
Created digital forms for leave requests, certifications, and financial aid, reducing processing time by 15%
Oversaw HR records for 90+ soldiers, ensuring 100% audit accuracy and confidentiality compliance




Republic of Korea Army
- Special Warrior Award: Selected as a top-tier combat soldier based on excellence in marksmanship, physical training, mental resilience, and tactical leadership (top 10% of unit)
BYU-Idaho
- Unsung Hero Small ‘l’ Leadership Award, IBC Class (Spring 2024)
